subject: New Assignment: Go Developer – Go
body:
Hi there,

I wanted to share an exciting opportunity that just came in from NordCast, a company in the telecom/media space.

They are scaling their engineering team and are looking for a Go Developer to join on a contract basis.

What they're looking for:
• Go
• GCP
• Kubernetes
• DynamoDB

Practical details:
• Start: 2022-08-03
• Duration: 12 months
• Location: Stockholm (hybrid)
• Rate: up to 925 SEK/h

If this sounds like a fit, or you know someone who might be – reach out!

Best regards,
Niklas Persson
Country Manager
Nexum Consulting
Tel: +46 70 012 34 56
